title: El rebozo de Soledad
writer: Roberto Gavaldón, Estela Inda, Javier López Ferrer
actors: Arturo de Córdova, Pedro Armendáriz, Estela Inda
plot: Melodrama about Dr. Alberto Robles, an idealistic city physician living in a rural community ruled by macho customs and feudalistic landowners, who falls for Soledad, a peasant woman.
